name: agentic-engineering-workflow
description: Pixel Perfect Apps' open-source workflow plugins for Claude Code — turn Claude into a Director of Engineering with sprint cadence, multi-agent review triad, ADR discipline, and one-keystroke bug/idea capture.

plugins.name: agentic-engineering-workflow
plugins.description: Scaffold a Claude-driven team workflow into any workspace. Installs /defect + /idea slash commands, an AGENTS.md guide, ADR structure, tracker projects + labels, and the bootstrap skill that wires it all together.
